narrative:
Parma Heights-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,047 registered voters, with 67.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.8 percentage points.
